pbltv:programme.tv:title: Today
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:cataloglongsynoposis: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: Today Extra
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Join the TODAY EXTRA team for an exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, LIVE music performances, the latest in fashion and beauty trends.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Join the TODAY EXTRA team for an exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, LIVE music performances, the latest in fashion and beauty trends.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Join the TODAY EXTRA team for an exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, LIVE music performances, the latest in fashion and beauty trends.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:cataloglongsynoposis: Join the TODAY EXTRA team for an exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, LIVE music performances, the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: 9News Morning
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:cataloglongsynoposis: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: Married At First Sight
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Revelations Week asks our couples to be vulnerable as a new task begins. In front of peers raw truths will be exposed, but it's one grooms honesty that leaves the room speechless.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Revelations Week asks our couples to be vulnerable as a new task begins. In front of peers raw truths will be exposed, but it's one grooms honesty that leaves the room speechless.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Revelations Week asks our couples to be vulnerable as a new task begins. In front of peers raw truths will be exposed, but it's one grooms honesty that leaves the room speechless.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:cataloglongsynoposis: Australia's most controversial social experiment returns with another addictive mix of love and drama.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:episodelongsynoposis: Revelations Week asks our couples to be vulnerable as a new task begins. In front of peers raw truths will be exposed, but it's one grooms honesty that leaves the room speechless.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026-milano Encore
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Join Lydia Lassila OAM for all the action and highlights from Nine's Day 5 coverage of the Winter Olympic Games 2026.

pbltv:seriesinfo.pbltv:seriesname: Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026-milano Encore

pbltv:programme.pbltv:episodelongsynoposis: Join Lydia Lassila OAM for all the action and highlights from Nine's Day 5 coverage of the Winter Olympic Games 2026.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: Tipping Point
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:cataloglongsynoposis: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: 9News Afternoon
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: 9News Afternoon, live and local with the latest news across Australia and around the world including sport and weather.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: 9News Afternoon, live and local with the latest news across Australia and around the world including sport and weather.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: Tipping Point Australia
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:cataloglongsynoposis: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: 9News
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

pbltv:programme.pbltv:cataloglongsynoposis: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: A Current Affair
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:cataloglongsynoposis: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 - Night
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Join hosts Allison Langdon and James Bracey for Nine's Olympic Winter Games Day 6 coverage which may include: Men's Skeleton Runs & Snowboard Cross, Women's Super Alpine Skiing, Men's Moguls Quals & Final. Live coverage from 7:30PM AEDT.

pbltv:seriesinfo.pbltv:seriesname: Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 - Night

pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Join hosts Allison Langdon and James Bracey for Nine's Olympic Winter Games Day 6 coverage which may include: Men's Skeleton Runs & Snowboard Cross, Women's Super Alpine Skiing, Men's Moguls Quals & Final. Live coverage from 7:30PM AEDT.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Join hosts Allison Langdon and James Bracey for Nine's Olympic Winter Games Day 6 coverage which may include: Men's Skeleton Runs & Snowboard Cross, Women's Super Alpine Skiing, Men's Moguls Quals & Final. Live coverage from 7:30PM AEDT.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:episodelongsynoposis: Join hosts Allison Langdon and James Bracey for Nine's Olympic Winter Games Day 6 coverage which may include: Men's Skeleton Runs & Snowboard Cross, Women's Super Alpine Skiing, Men's Moguls Quals & Final. Live coverage from 7:30PM AEDT.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 - Post Midnight
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Join host Leila McKinnon for Nine's Olympic Winter Games day 6 coverage which may include: Men's Snowboard Cross Men's Final, Women's 10km Cross Country Skiing & 5000m Speed Skating Final. Live coverage continues from 12:00AM local.

pbltv:seriesinfo.pbltv:seriesname: Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 - Post Midnight

pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Join host Leila McKinnon for Nine's Olympic Winter Games day 6 coverage which may include: Men's Snowboard Cross Men's Final, Women's 10km Cross Country Skiing & 5000m Speed Skating Final. Live coverage continues from 12:00AM local.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Join host Leila McKinnon for Nine's Olympic Winter Games day 6 coverage which may include: Men's Snowboard Cross Men's Final, Women's 10km Cross Country Skiing & 5000m Speed Skating Final. Live coverage continues from 12:00AM local.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:episodelongsynoposis: Join host Leila McKinnon for Nine's Olympic Winter Games day 6 coverage which may include: Men's Snowboard Cross Men's Final, Women's 10km Cross Country Skiing & 5000m Speed Skating Final. Live coverage continues from 12:00AM local.

pbltv:programme.tv:title: Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 - Overnight
pbltv:programme.tv:desc: Join hosts Leila McKinnon, Sylvia Jeffreys & Dylan Alcott for Nine's Olympic Winter Games day 6 coverage which may include: Women's 5000m Speed Skating Final, Men's Ice Hockey & Luge Team Relay. Live coverage continues from 3:00AM local.

pbltv:seriesinfo.pbltv:seriesname: Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 - Overnight

pbltv:programme.pbltv:shortsynopsis: Join hosts Leila McKinnon, Sylvia Jeffreys & Dylan Alcott for Nine's Olympic Winter Games day 6 coverage which may include: Women's 5000m Speed Skating Final, Men's Ice Hockey & Luge Team Relay. Live coverage continues from 3:00AM local.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:longsynopsis: Join hosts Leila McKinnon, Sylvia Jeffreys & Dylan Alcott for Nine's Olympic Winter Games day 6 coverage which may include: Women's 5000m Speed Skating Final, Men's Ice Hockey & Luge Team Relay. Live coverage continues from 3:00AM local.
pbltv:programme.pbltv:episodelongsynoposis: Join hosts Leila McKinnon, Sylvia Jeffreys & Dylan Alcott for Nine's Olympic Winter Games day 6 coverage which may include: Women's 5000m Speed Skating Final, Men's Ice Hockey & Luge Team Relay. Live coverage continues from 3:00AM local.
